2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX
22 - 24 May 2026
The FIA Formula 1 Media Delegate
From The FIA Formula 1 Media Delegate
To All Teams, All Officials
Document 86
Date 24 May 2026
Time 09:47
Title Pre-Race Procedure
Description Pre-Race Procedure
Enclosed 2026 Canadian Grand Prix - Pre-Race Procedure.pdf
Roman De Lauw

  
 2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX 22 – 24 May 2026      From The FIA Formula One Media Delegate      To All Officials, All Teams      Date  24 May 2026      NOTE TO TEAMS: PRE-RACE PROCEDURE  Please find below a summary of the requirements for the Pre-Race activities and National Anthem as set out in Article B10.1.4b of the FIA F1 Regulations: “In any case, no less than sixteen (16) minutes before the scheduled start of the formation lap all drivers must be present at the front of the grid for the playing of the national anthem.”  15:40:00 Drivers move to National Anthem Position. Drivers will be expected to be in position no later than 15:42:00.  15:44:00 The National Anthem. For the duration of the National Anthem all Drivers must remain attired only in their race suits.  Failure to comply with these procedures will be reported to the Stewards.  Please see the attached National A
